UK forecast to see biggest hit to growth from Iran war out of major economiesThe OECD downgrades forecasts for many of the world's biggest economies due to the US-Israel war with Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgk0j71g417o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgk0j71g417o#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 12:56:33 GMT
NS&I boss replaced as savers left waiting for millions of poundsPensions Minister Torston Bell said those affected would receive compensation "where appropriate". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3w3eg4n9zwo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3w3eg4n9zwo#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 16:14:54 GMT
Zelensky visits Saudi Arabia after offering Ukraine's drone expertiseThere is renewed urgency for Ukraine to get a drone deal done, as the US increasingly focuses on Iran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2r4wxdw3no?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2r4wxdw3no#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 18:24:13 GMT
Olympic women's sport limited to biological femalesThe women's category of Olympic sports will be limited to biological females from 2028, says the International Olympic Committee. https://www.bbc.com/sport/olympics/articles/cdj7dgvlj0no?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/sport/olympics/articles/cdj7dgvlj0no#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 14:29:18 GMT
Spanish woman dies by euthanasia after long legal battle with fatherThe European Court of Human Rights (ECHR) ruled in Noelia Castillo's favour earlier this week. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7vqdd23y0vo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c7vqdd23y0vo#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 20:33:07 GMT
Sarah Ferguson stripped of Freedom of City of York titleThe former duchess was given the honour in 1987 following her marriage to the then-Prince Andrew. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3w3ez3xp92o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3w3ez3xp92o#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 19:06:12 GMT
US prosecutors argue Maduro 'plundered' Venezuelan wealth in court battle over legal feesA judge said the right to defence was paramount as prosecutors argued the couple should not be able to use Venezuelan funds to pay their lawyers. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g8wxyq7v5o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g8wxyq7v5o#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 18:49:46 GMT
More than 13 million living in poverty, new figures showThe level rose slightly on the previous year while the number of children living in poverty has remained steady. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3w38qvz195o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3w38qvz195o#0 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 16:45:39 GMT
Israel says it has killed Iran's navy chief overseeing Strait of Hormuz blockadeIsrael's defence minister said a number of other "senior Navy command officials" have also been killed. Iran has not yet commented. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy81p99x07no?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy81p99x07no#1 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 15:26:36 GMT
UK CO2 plant to reopen in war contingency planThe government will invest £100m to restart the Teesside site producing carbon dioxide, a key part of food and drink manufacturing. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew7xrj4497o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cew7xrj4497o#1 Thu, 26 Mar 2026 09:55:18 GMT
